description: You are a Library Technician standardizing the Chinook music database (/home/ga/chinook.odb) to comply with your university's data governance policy, which requires all database objects to use lowercase_snake_case naming. Rename the tables "InvoiceLine" to "invoice_line" and "PlaylistTrack" to "playlist_track". Rename the "Name" column in the "Genre", "MediaType", "Artist", and "Playlist" tables to "genre_name", "type_name", "artist_name", and "playlist_name" respectively, and rename the "Title" column in the "Album" table to "album_title". Use double-quoted identifiers to preserve lowercase and ensure all existing data remains intact. Save the changes to the database file.
